====Pokémon==== {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Nessa |pkmn=Toxapex |type1=Poison |type2=Water |img=Nessa Toxapex Adventures.png |epnum=PASS08 |epname=Toasty!! Battle Against Toxapex |desc={{p|Toxapex}} is Nessa's first known Pokémon. It was first seen participating in a photo shoot with Nessa. Later, it was used in a battle against {{Henry}}'s [[Twiggy]]. Though it {{status|poison|poisoned}} its opponent with {{m|Baneful Bunker}}, Toxapex was defeated when its body was heated up by Twiggy's {{m|Sunny Day}}, leaving it wide open for Twiggy's next attack. Toxapex's only known move is {{m|Baneful Bunker}}.}} {{anchor|Drednaw 2}}{{TrainerPoké |trainer=Nessa |pkmn=Drednaw |giga=yes |type1=Water |type2=Rock |img=Nessa Drednaw Adventures.png |img2=Nessa Gigantamax Drednaw Adventures.png |img2_size=120px |cap=Nessa's Drednaw |cap2=Nessa's Drednaw |epnum=PASS08 |epname=Toasty!! Battle Against Toxapex |desc={{p|Drednaw}} is Nessa's second known Pokémon. It was first used in Nessa's Gym battle against {{Henry}}, but it was defeated by Henry's [[Twiggy]]. It is housed in a [[Dive Ball]]. None of Drednaw's moves are known{{tt|*|Drednaw is implied to know a damaging Normal-type and Water-type move due to the use of Max Strike and G-Max Stonesurge}}.
As a Gigantamax Drednaw, it can use {{m|Max Strike}} and {{m|G-Max Stonesurge}}.}} {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Nessa |pkmn=Quagsire |type1=Water |type2=Ground |img=Nessa Quagsire Adventures.png |epnum=PASS28 |epname=Splash!! The Return of the Two Pokémon |desc={{p|Quagsire}} is Nessa's third known Pokémon. It was first seen being used to battle {{p|Eternatus}} on the Tower Summit. None of Quagsire's moves are known.}} {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Nessa |pkmn=Barraskewda |type1=Water |img=Nessa Barraskewda Adventures.png |epnum=PASS29 |epname=GRRR!! The Irrepairable Gears |desc={{p|Barraskewda}} is Nessa's fourth known Pokémon. It was first seen being used to battle Eternamax {{p|Eternatus}} on the Tower Summit. None of Barraskewda's moves are known.}}
